name: my-template-acceptance
description: Browser-verifiable acceptance contract for my-template. The semantic validator grades the running app against these assertions — not the raw PRD.

evaluationRules.failOnUncertainty: If an assertion cannot be positively verified from the running app, mark it FAILED, not passed. Absence of evidence is a failure.
evaluationRules.credentials: The app must load and be browsable without any .env file, private keys, or funded testnet account. Missing credentials must not excuse a broken read path.
evaluationRules.walletGatedFlows: When the harness provides a Test Signer: assertions flagged executableWithTestSigner=true MUST be executed end-to-end and verified via the testnet mirror node. Other walletRequired assertions stay affordance-only. When no Test Signer is provided, treat all walletRequired as affordance-only.
evaluationRules.onChainVerification: For executableWithTestSigner assertions, confirm effects via https://testnet.mirrornode.hedera.com (topics/messages/tokens/contracts as relevant). Poll up to ~30s for mirror lag.
evaluationRules.evidence: Every verdict issue must cite what was observed (route visited, element found/absent, console output, mirror responses for on-chain flows).

severityMeaning.critical: Route/app is broken or a core journey is impossible; run cannot pass.
severityMeaning.major: A required PRD capability is missing or non-functional on the read/affordance level.
severityMeaning.minor: Coherence or documentation gap that degrades the demo but does not break a journey.

assertions.statement: The home route renders the demo primary UI without a wallet and without runtime/console errors.
assertions.howToVerify: Navigate to /. Confirm primary content is visible and the browser console shows no uncaught errors or crash banners (Internal Server Error, Application error, Unhandled Runtime Error).

assertions.statement: REPLACE_ME — a major read-path capability from the PRD (network label, empty state, feed, etc.).
REPLACE_ME — the wallet-gated control is visible and explains that a wallet/testnet is required; no crash when visiting the route without connecting.
assertions.howToVerify: Navigate to the route without connecting a wallet. Confirm the affordance exists and messaging is clear; do not attempt an on-chain transaction unless a Test Signer is provided and this assertion is marked executableWithTestSigner.

assertions.statement: REPLACE_ME — with the harness test signer, complete the primary write flow (e.g. submit message / call contract) and verify the effect on the testnet mirror node.
assertions.howToVerify: Inject burnerWallet.pk, connect Burner Wallet, execute the write flow, then confirm via mirror node REST (topics/messages/tokens/contracts as appropriate). Cite mirror evidence.
